p.em: 12-byte structure prepended to the TCP Segment for checksum calculation only.
Ensures segments are not delivered to the wrong IP address or protocol.

g.text: ------------------- WIRE BOUNDARY: PSEUDO-HEADER IS NOT TRANSMITTED -------------------

ul.li: Algorithm: 16-bit one's complement sum of all 16-bit words in the Pseudo-Header + TCP Segment.
Zero Padding: If the total length is not a multiple of 2 bytes, a zero pad byte (0x00) is appended for calculation only.
The Zero Field: Must be all zeros (8 bits).
Protocol Field: For TCP, this value is always 6 (0x06).
Checksum Field: When calculating, the Checksum field in the TCP header is treated as zero.

g.title: Total octets in TCP Header + TCP Data
Total octets in TCP Header + TCP Data
